title: readsf~

messages.description: prints information on Pd's terminal window
channel output of a given file

arguments.description: per channel buffer size in bytes

methods.description: sets a filename, an onset in samples, header size to skip, number of channels, bytes per sample, and endianness

body: The readsf~ object reads a soundfile into its signal outputs. You must open the soundfile in advance (a couple of seconds before you'll need it
